name: Mega Compact
description: Layered, local, vector-backed context compressor (Trident engine) for OpenClaw compaction.

stateDir.description: Directory for vector store persistence. Defaults to ~/.pi/agent/extensions/pi-mega-compact or MEGA_COMPACT_STATE_DIR env var.

dedupSim.description: Cosine similarity threshold for dedup detection (0-1). Higher = stricter matching.

preserveRecent.description: Number of recent messages to always keep verbatim (not compacted).

stateDir.label: State Directory
stateDir.help: Directory for vector store persistence. Leave empty to use the default (~/.pi/agent/extensions/pi-mega-compact).

dedupSim.label: Dedup Similarity Threshold
dedupSim.help: Cosine similarity threshold for detecting duplicate compaction regions. 0.9 is a good default; lower for more aggressive dedup, higher for stricter matching.

preserveRecent.label: Preserve Recent Messages
preserveRecent.help: Number of recent messages to always keep verbatim and never compact.

debug.label: Debug Logging
debug.help: Enable verbose debug logging for the compaction engine.
